title: Xpanda Pro delivers peace of mind, style and long-term value
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Whether you’re looking to beat the winter chill, upgrade your home’s security, or adding timeless style, Xpanda Pro Garden Route has a tailored solution for you.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Whether you’re looking to beat the winter chill, upgrade your home’s security, or adding timeless style, Xpanda Pro Garden Route has a tailored solution for you."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Located in Marsh Street, Mossel Bay, we are your trusted specialists in premium security, lifestyle and home improvement solutions."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We supply and install Xpanda security barriers, Jetmaster fireplaces and braais, and American Shutters, delivering top-quality products with expert craftsmanship.","html":"We supply and install Xpanda security barriers, Jetmaster fireplaces and braais, and American Shutters, delivering top-quality products with expert craftsmanship."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Being nominated for Best of Mossel Bay in three categories - Best Aluminium Installer, Best Door & Window Security, and Best Garage Doors - is a great honour and reflects the trust and satisfaction of our valued clients.","html":"Being nominated for Best of Mossel Bay in three categories - Best Aluminium Installer, Best Door & Window Security, and Best Garage Doors - is a great honour and reflects the trust and satisfaction of our valued clients."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Xpanda has been frustrating criminals for over 50 years. What sets us apart is our hands-on approach to service, attention to detail and commitment to only the best products in the industry.","html":"Xpanda has been frustrating criminals for over 50 years. What sets us apart is our hands-on approach to service, attention to detail and commitment to only the best products in the industry."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Our Mossel Bay team, Wessel and Lize van der Westhuizen, stay on top of their game through ongoing training, accurate assessments, neat installations and by putting our customers’ needs first every time.","html":"Our Mossel Bay team, Wessel and Lize van der Westhuizen, stay on top of their game through ongoing training, accurate assessments, neat installations and by putting our customers’ needs first every time."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your vote for Xpanda Pro Garden Route will help spread the word that Xpanda’s Real Security is not just a tagline, but a promise.","html":"Your vote for Xpanda Pro Garden Route will help spread the word that Xpanda’s Real Security is not just a tagline, but a promise."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Cast your vote here: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/mossel-bay/"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We deliver peace of mind, style and long-term value. We’re proud to be part of the Mossel Bay community, offering Real Security, Real Fast.","html":"We deliver peace of mind, style and long-term value. We’re proud to be part of the Mossel Bay community, offering Real Security, Real Fast."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Come and visit us at our showroom in Marsh Street, Mossel Bay, or for more information, contact us on 044 007 0298 or email us at [email protected].","html":"Come and visit us at our showroom in Marsh Street, Mossel Bay, or for more information, contact us on 044 007 0298 or email us at [email protected]."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
